rows.label: qev050601_MSG0001
rows.name:
We ride forth to the distant
Black Steel Continent to hunt
down our hateful, sworn enemy![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050601_MSG0002
rows.name:
You there, Earthling! You are
the great warrior who struck
down Ga Derg-sama, are you not?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050601_MSG0003
rows.name:
Following the deep bonds of alliance
between Earthlings and the Lars— I ask
you, will you not join us in this battle?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050601_JNK0010
rows.name: Question

rows.label: qev050601_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask him what exactly they intend to do.

rows.label: qev050601_JNK0020
rows.name: Guess

rows.label: qev050601_SEL0021
rows.name:
Ask if they intend to start
a fight with the Growth.

rows.label: qev050601_MSG0004
rows.name:
The monster that devoured our families
when we first landed on this world!
We ride to hunt the Queen Hastara![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050601_MSG0005
rows.name:
The time will eventually come when we must
also exact vengeance upon those who sullied
our pride... However, that time is not now.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050601_MSG0006
rows.name:
The monster that tore apart and trampled
our families when we first landed on this
world! We ride to hunt the Queen Hastara![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050601_MSG0007
rows.name:
Normally, logic dictates that
we should undertake such a
mission of vengeance on our own.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050601_MSG0008
rows.name:
However, our Dolls and weapons are currently all
broken... And the ones who could repair them were also
killed by the Queen Hastara, leaving none behind...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050601_MSG0009
rows.name:
If we go alone, the tables will likely
just be turned on us. That is why...
swallowing my shame, I am asking this of you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050601_MSG0010
rows.name:
I beg of you! Will you stand alongside
the patriots of the Lars and put an
end to the Queen Hastara?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050601_JNK0210
rows.name: Refuse

rows.label: qev050601_SEL0211
rows.name:
Refuse, stating that you
are busy right now.

rows.label: qev050601_JNK0220
rows.name: Affirm

rows.label: qev050601_SEL0221
rows.name: Give a powerful nod.

rows.label: qev050601_MSG0064
rows.name:
I see... But... we need your
strength for this battle.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050601_MSG0065
rows.name:
Please! If you change your
mind, speak to me again![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050601_MSG0011
rows.name:
I am forever in your debt!
Now, let us immediately...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050601_MSG0012
rows.name:
Oh! You have arrived at the perfect time!
Sankesshu, this warrior has agreed to lend
their strength to our quest for vengeance![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050601_MSG0013
rows.name:
...General. We don't need an outsider's
help for this battle. This is a Larsian
fight, through and through.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050601_MSG0014
rows.name:
Yes, exactly as my brother says! We will avenge
our father with the strength of the Lars alone...
That is why we have been honing our skills![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050601_MSG0015
rows.name:
Da Naguth of the Gale! Da Girhi of the Lightning! And
me, Da Zeulbe the Boulder-Smasher... With us three
siblings together, there is no enemy we cannot defeat![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050601_MSG0016
rows.name:
Besides, I don't think such
a scrawny weakling could
possibly be of any help to us![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050601_JNK0030
rows.name: Provoke

rows.label: qev050601_SEL0031
rows.name:
Retort that you possess far
more skill than the Sankesshu.

rows.label: qev050601_JNK0040
rows.name: Humble

rows.label: qev050601_SEL0041
rows.name:
State that while you cannot match brave
Larsians, you should be of some use.

rows.label: qev050601_MSG0017
rows.name:
Guh... You audacious fool! We will
have to see for ourselves if your
courage is more than just empty words![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050601_MSG0018
rows.name:
I see! So you do know
your place, at least![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050601_MSG0019
rows.name:
However, we are heading into a desperate
battle to the death! With such a soft
mindset, you'll only be a burden to us![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050601_MSG0020
rows.name:
Stop this! Do not quarrel! I am
not making light of you all... I
simply do not want you to die.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050601_MSG0021
rows.name:
...Then, before the battle, would
you allow us siblings to conduct a
mock battle with this warrior?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050601_MSG0022
rows.name:
If we are to fight together, we need
to know their true capabilities...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050601_MSG0023
rows.name:
If they prove to be a burden, there would be no
need to drag them to the battlefield and have
them needlessly throw their life away, correct?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050601_MSG0024
rows.name:
...What do you say? Don't you
want to see the power of us
Sankesshu for yourself as well?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050601_JNK0050
rows.name: Affirm

rows.label: qev050601_SEL0051
rows.name:
Nod and say you definitely
want to see it.

rows.label: qev050601_JNK0060
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev050601_SEL0061
rows.name:
Honestly state that
you have no interest.

rows.label: qev050601_MSG0025
rows.name:
Heh heh, how honest... Then we shall
wait for you at Stickstone Rise.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050601_MSG0026
rows.name:
We will hold back as much as possible,
but... Please, come prepared.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050601_MSG0027
rows.name:
...Are you saying we are beneath
your notice? Heh heh, what a
courageous person you are.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050601_MSG0028
rows.name:
Then please come to Stickstone
Rise. We will properly repay you
for that reckless bravery there.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050601_MSG0029
rows.name:
Their parents were also killed by the Queen
Hastara. They likely harbor a strong desire
to exact vengeance with their own hands...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050601_MSG0030
rows.name:
However... as the general of this battle, I
cannot allow them to die meaningless deaths.
That is why I decided to gather troops.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050601_MSG0031
rows.name:
...Please, strike down the
Sankesshu and make them realize
their own inexperience.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050601_MSG0032
rows.name:
Haha! It seems my judgment was not flawed
after all! The Sankesshu have informed me
that they will fight alongside you![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050601_MSG0033
rows.name:
Still, to think that Da Naguth would
acknowledge you to such an extent... You
are truly no ordinary warrior, are you?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050601_JNK0070
rows.name: Boast

rows.label: qev050601_SEL0071
rows.name:
Boastfully declare that you
are the strongest in BLADE.

rows.label: qev050601_JNK0080
rows.name: Humble

rows.label: qev050601_SEL0081
rows.name:
Modestly state that you are
merely an ordinary BLADE.

rows.label: qev050601_MSG0034
rows.name:
...I see. It seems I may have
invited an unimaginably powerful
warrior into our ranks.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050601_MSG0035
rows.name:
What a modest warrior you are... But no matter
how you try to hide it, the sheer intensity
radiating from you cannot be concealed.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050601_MSG0036
rows.name:
Heh! With you and the Sankesshu joining forces,
even the Queen Hastara will be no match for us!
Alright! Let me explain the strategy at once![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050601_MSG0037
rows.name:
First, in order to lure out the Queen Hastara, who
rarely descends to the ground, we will strike down
her minions across the Black Steel Continent.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050601_MSG0038
rows.name:
Because we must defeat them over a
wide area, you and the Sankesshu
will split up and eliminate them.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050601_MSG0039
rows.name:
And once the Queen Hastara shows herself, whoever
spots her will call out on the comms to regroup.
Then, we will strike her down all at once![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050601_MSG0040
rows.name: Hmm... That's a rather rough strategy...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050601_MSG0041
rows.name:
Say, do we know anything about its weaknesses?
The only time we actually saw it was when
that blood-soaked thing was flying away.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050601_MSG0042
rows.name:
So we don't really know what kind of
opponent we're actually up against.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050601_MSG0043
rows.name:
It seems to share the same basic traits as its
minions, but... Now that you mention it, [ST:playername ], you
have defeated its minions before, haven't you?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050601_MSG0044
rows.name:
If you don't mind, could you tell us their
weaknesses? You are the only one among us
who has actually faced them in combat.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050601_JNK0090
rows.name: Physical[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050601_SEL0091
rows.name: Say they are weak to physical attacks.

rows.label: qev050601_JNK0100
rows.name: Fire[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050601_SEL0101
rows.name:
Say they are weak to
fire-attribute attacks.

rows.label: qev050601_JNK0110
rows.name: Electric[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050601_SEL0111
rows.name:
Say they are weak to
electric-attribute attacks.

rows.label: qev050601_MSG0045
rows.name:
Hmm... I see. Then what kind of
methods does it use when it attacks?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050601_JNK0120
rows.name: Gravity Attack[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050601_SEL0121
rows.name:
Warn them to watch out for
powerful gravity attacks.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050601_JNK0130
rows.name: Laser Attack[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050601_SEL0131
rows.name:
Warn them to watch out for
lasers fired from its horns.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050601_JNK0140
rows.name: Charge Attack[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050601_SEL0141
rows.name:
Warn them to watch out for
charge attacks using its horns.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050601_MSG0046
rows.name:
Oh... You managed to observe the enemy
that closely during such a short battle?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050601_MSG0047
rows.name:
Well, in that case, we have our
own ways of handling things.
Leave the rear support to me![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050601_MSG0048
rows.name:
Alright... Then, General, we
will head to the Black Steel
Continent ahead of you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050601_MSG0049
rows.name:
[ST:playername ]! We will absolutely smoke out the
Queen Hastara and strike her down![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050601_MSG0050
rows.name:
I leave it in your hands! Alongside the
Sankesshu, you must absolutely strike down
the sworn enemy that devoured our families.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050601_MSG0051
rows.name:
That day... those of us who
remained at the base could not
even put a single scratch on it...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050601_MSG0052
rows.name:
Please, be extremely careful. They are not
like ordinary native creatures... They are
demons, born solely to devour humans.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050601_MSG0053
rows.name:
You returned alive! So... the
outcome of the battle? Were you
able to slay the Queen Hastara?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050601_MSG0054
rows.name:
...Ohhh! I see! You cornered it with
the Sankesshu and defeated it![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050601_MSG0055
rows.name:
Thank you! With this, everyone's regrets... The
regrets of my deceased son will also be cleared.
This is your reward. Please accept it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050601_MSG0056
rows.name:
...Yes. From now on, I will treat the
Sankesshu as my own children, and
raise them to be warriors like you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050601_MSG0057
rows.name:
And someday, we will defeat the Growth
who trampled over us! When that time
comes, let us fight together once more![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050601_MSG0058
rows.name:
You returned alive! So... the
outcome of the battle? Were you
able to slay the Queen Hastara?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050601_MSG0059
rows.name:
...What?! You managed to defeat it, but...
The Sankesshu were killed by it...?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050601_MSG0060
rows.name:
Guh... But they, too, were warriors who challenged
it putting their lives on the line... If our sworn
enemy is dead, they would have no regrets.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050601_MSG0061
rows.name:
Thank you... It is all thanks to you.
This is your reward. Please accept it...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050601_MSG0062
rows.name:
My son was also killed by that thing...
I thought of the Sankesshu, who were around
the same age, as my own children...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050601_MSG0063
rows.name:
At the very least, I must give
them a proper burial, just as
I would my own family...[ST:wait ]
